task: Return the absolute value of each element (positive stays, negative becomes positive)
error_location: correct — validates np.where as abs pattern
clarification_query: Does np.where(arr>0, arr, -arr) correctly compute absolute value?
clarification_options: yes, this is equivalent to np.abs(arr)
no, the condition should be arr >= 0
expected_user_response: yes, this is equivalent to np.abs(arr)
explanation: np.where(arr>0, arr, -arr) returns arr when positive and -arr (which is positive) when negative, equivalent to np.abs.
